news.title: Energy & Utilities Roundup: Market Talk
news.summary: Find insight on Orsted, Tenaga Nasional, Mercury NZ and more in the latest Market Talks covering Energy and Utilities.

news.title: Ørsted Advances Flagship Offshore Wind Projects With Earnings And Risk In Focus
news.summary: Ørsted (CPSE:ORSTED) has started installing foundations at the Baltica 2 offshore wind project in Poland. The company has also commissioned the first monopile foundation at Hornsea 3 in the UK, which is set to be the largest offshore wind farm in the world. These steps mark progress on two large European offshore wind projects in Ørsted's portfolio. For investors tracking the build out of renewabl

news.title: Ørsted and PGE kick off offshore installation of Baltica 2 project
news.summary: Ørsted and PGE have installed the first foundations of the Baltica 2 project in the Polish part of the Baltic Sea.

news.title: Ørsted and PGE start offshore works on Baltica 2 wind farm
news.summary: Van Oord is carrying out the installation programme, which involves placing 111 monopiles.

news.title: Ørsted’s Q1 2026 net profit falls 46% to $412m
news.summary: The result was influenced by non-cash tax effects and impairments due to elevated long-dated US interest rates.

news.title: Orsted’s Earnings Rise on Jump in Offshore Generation
news.summary: The renewable-energy company’s earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization rose 8% from a year earlier.

news.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Ørsted (CPSE:ORSTED) After Its Recent Share Price Rebound
news.summary: If you are wondering whether Ørsted’s share price still offers value after a rocky few years, or if the easy gains are already gone, this article breaks down what the current price might be telling you. news.title: This Week In Energy Transition - Perigus Energy Emerges as New Onshore Renewable Powerhouse
news.summary: Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners (CIP) has completed the acquisition of Ørsted's European onshore platform, leading to the launch of Perigus Energy, a new player in the European onshore renewable energy sector.
